meaning: adj.淀粉的,拘泥的,浆硬的,含淀粉的
examples: Focus on healthful whole grains, beans and starchy vegetables.
But a big starchy meal can give the body more glucose than it needs.
Both men and women began eating more starchy grains, such as corn and wheat, which contain sugars.
Here, the green plantain mofongo was served as a side dish, the perfect starchy accompaniment to fried chicken or pork.
But it is Fowler, that supposedly starchy old schoolmaster, who is the most striking opponent of rigidity.
